EigenTorch Documentation¶

EigenTorch provides Eigen-style C++ APIs backed by libtorch for dense, sparse, geometry, and unsupported-module workflows.

Guides

  • Quickstart
    • Requirements
    • Build
    • Select Compute Device
    • Example
  • Module Coverage
    • Core and Dense
    • Sparse
    • Unsupported Modules
  • Testing
    • Run All Tests
    • Current Test Targets
    • What The Unsupported Tests Cover

API Reference¶

Device Management¶

class DeviceManager¶

Public Static Functions

static inline void set_default_device(const torch::Device &device)¶
static inline torch::Device get_default_device()¶
static inline bool is_mps_available()¶

Public Static Attributes

static torch::Device default_device = torch::kCPU¶

Core Linear Algebra¶

template<typename Scalar_, int RowsAtCompileTime_, int ColsAtCompileTime_>
class Matrix¶

Public Types

using Scalar = Scalar_¶
using ScalarType = Scalar_¶

Public Functions

inline Matrix()¶
inline explicit Matrix(const at::Tensor &tensor)¶
inline Matrix(int rows, int cols)¶
inline explicit Matrix(int size)¶
template<typename OtherScalar, int OtherRows, int OtherCols>
inline Matrix(const Matrix<OtherScalar, OtherRows, OtherCols> &other)¶
inline at::Tensor &tensor()¶
inline const at::Tensor &tensor() const¶
inline int rows() const¶
inline int cols() const¶
inline int size() const¶
inline bool isVector() const¶
inline Scalar_ *data()¶
inline const Scalar_ *data() const¶
inline Scalar_ operator()(int row, int col) const¶
inline CoeffProxy operator()(int row, int col)¶
inline Scalar_ operator()(int index) const¶
inline CoeffProxy operator()(int index)¶
inline Scalar_ coeff(int row, int col) const¶
inline CoeffProxy coeffRef(int row, int col)¶
inline Scalar_ coeff(int index) const¶
inline CoeffProxy coeffRef(int index)¶
inline Scalar_ x() const¶
inline Scalar_ y() const¶
inline Scalar_ z() const¶
inline Scalar_ w() const¶
inline CoeffProxy x()¶
inline CoeffProxy y()¶
inline CoeffProxy z()¶
inline CoeffProxy w()¶
inline void resize(int rows, int cols)¶
inline void resize(int size)¶
template<typename OtherScalar, int OtherRows, int OtherCols>
inline void resizeLike(const Matrix<OtherScalar, OtherRows, OtherCols> &other)¶
inline void conservativeResize(int rows, int cols)¶
inline void conservativeResize(int size)¶
inline Matrix &setZero()¶
inline Matrix &setZero(int rows, int cols)¶
inline Matrix &setOnes()¶
inline Matrix &setOnes(int rows, int cols)¶
inline Matrix &setConstant(Scalar_ value)¶
inline Matrix &setConstant(int rows, int cols, Scalar_ value)¶
inline Matrix &setRandom()¶
inline Matrix &setRandom(int rows, int cols)¶
inline Matrix &setIdentity()¶
inline Matrix &setIdentity(int rows, int cols)¶
template<typename OtherScalar, int OtherRows, int OtherCols>
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> operator*(const Matrix<OtherScalar, OtherRows, OtherCols> &other) const¶
template<typename OtherScalar, int OtherRows, int OtherCols>
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> operator+(const Matrix<OtherScalar, OtherRows, OtherCols> &other) const¶
template<typename OtherScalar, int OtherRows, int OtherCols>
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> operator-(const Matrix<OtherScalar, OtherRows, OtherCols> &other) const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> operator*(Scalar_ scalar) const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> operator/(Scalar_ scalar) const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> operator+(Scalar_ scalar) const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> operator-(Scalar_ scalar) const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> operator-() const¶
inline Matrix &operator+=(const Matrix &other)¶
inline Matrix &operator-=(const Matrix &other)¶
inline Matrix &operator*=(Scalar_ scalar)¶
inline Matrix &operator/=(Scalar_ scalar)¶
inline Matrix &operator*=(const Matrix &other)¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> transpose() const¶
inline void transposeInPlace()¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> adjoint() const¶
inline void adjointInPlace()¶
template<typename OtherScalar, int OtherRows, int OtherCols>
inline Scalar_ dot(const Matrix<OtherScalar, OtherRows, OtherCols> &other) const¶
template<typename OtherScalar, int OtherRows, int OtherCols>
inline Matrix<Scalar_, 3, 1> cross(const Matrix<OtherScalar, OtherRows, OtherCols> &other) const¶
template<typename OtherScalar, int OtherRows, int OtherCols>
inline Matrix<Scalar_, 3, 1> cross3(const Matrix<OtherScalar, OtherRows, OtherCols> &other) const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, 1> homogeneous() const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, 1> hnormalized() const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, 1> unitOrthogonal() const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> block(int startRow, int startCol, int blockRows, int blockCols)¶
inline const Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> block(int startRow, int startCol, int blockRows, int blockCols) const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> topLeftCorner(int blockRows, int blockCols)¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> topRightCorner(int blockRows, int blockCols)¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> bottomLeftCorner(int blockRows, int blockCols)¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> bottomRightCorner(int blockRows, int blockCols)¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> topRows(int blockRows)¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> bottomRows(int blockRows)¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> leftCols(int blockCols)¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> rightCols(int blockCols)¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, 1> head(int n) const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, 1> tail(int n) const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, 1> segment(int start, int n) const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, 1, Dynamic> row(int i)¶
inline const Matrix<Scalar_, 1, Dynamic> row(int i) const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, 1> col(int i)¶
inline const Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, 1> col(int i) const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> cwiseProduct(const Matrix &other) const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> cwiseQuotient(const Matrix &other) const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> cwiseAbs() const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> cwiseAbs2() const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> cwiseSqrt() const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> cwiseInverse() const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> cwiseMin(const Matrix &other) const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> cwiseMax(const Matrix &other) const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> cwiseMin(Scalar_ scalar) const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> cwiseMax(Scalar_ scalar) const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> conjugate() const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> real() const¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> imag() const¶
inline Scalar_ sum() const¶
inline Scalar_ prod() const¶
inline Scalar_ mean() const¶
inline Scalar_ maxCoeff() const¶
inline Scalar_ minCoeff() const¶
inline Scalar_ squaredNorm() const¶
inline Scalar_ norm() const¶
inline Matrix normalized() const¶
inline Matrix &normalize()¶
inline Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> inverse() const¶
inline Scalar_ determinant() const¶
inline Matrix eval() const¶
Array<Scalar_, RowsAtCompileTime_, ColsAtCompileTime_> array()¶
const Array<Scalar_, RowsAtCompileTime_, ColsAtCompileTime_> array() const¶
inline Matrix &matrix()¶
inline const Matrix &matrix() const¶
template<typename UnaryFunc>
inline Matrix unaryExpr(UnaryFunc fn) const¶
inline PartialPivLU<Matrix> partialPivLu() const¶
inline FullPivLU<Matrix> fullPivLu() const¶
inline HouseholderQR<Matrix> householderQr() const¶
inline ColPivHouseholderQR<Matrix> colPivHouseholderQr() const¶
inline FullPivHouseholderQR<Matrix> fullPivHouseholderQr() const¶
inline LLT<Matrix> llt() const¶
inline LDLT<Matrix> ldlt() const¶
inline JacobiSVD<Matrix> jacobiSvd(unsigned int computationOptions = 0) const¶
inline BDCSVD<Matrix> bdcSvd(unsigned int computationOptions = 0) const¶
inline CompleteOrthogonalDecomposition<Matrix> completeOrthogonalDecomposition() const¶
inline EigenSolver<Matrix> eigenSolver(bool computeEigenvectors = true) const¶
inline SelfAdjointEigenSolver<Matrix> selfAdjointEigenSolver(bool computeEigenvectors = true) const¶
inline ComplexEigenSolver<Matrix> complexEigenSolver(bool computeEigenvectors = true) const¶

Public Static Functions

static inline torch::ScalarType get_torch_dtype()¶
static inline Matrix Random(int rows, int cols)¶
static inline Matrix Zero(int rows, int cols)¶
static inline Matrix Ones(int rows, int cols)¶
static inline Matrix Identity(int rows, int cols)¶
static inline Matrix Constant(int rows, int cols, Scalar_ value)¶
static inline Matrix Unit(int size, int index)¶
static inline Matrix Unit(int index)¶
static inline Matrix UnitX()¶
static inline Matrix UnitY()¶
static inline Matrix UnitZ()¶
static inline Matrix UnitW()¶

Public Static Attributes

static int RowsAtCompileTime = RowsAtCompileTime_¶
static int ColsAtCompileTime = ColsAtCompileTime_¶
static int SizeAtCompileTime = (RowsAtCompileTime_ == Dynamic || ColsAtCompileTime_ == Dynamic) ? Dynamic : RowsAtCompileTime_ * ColsAtCompileTime_¶

Friends

inline friend Matrix<Scalar_, Dynamic, Dynamic> operator*(Scalar_ scalar, const Matrix &m)¶
inline friend std::ostream &operator<<(std::ostream &os, const Matrix &m)¶
class CoeffProxy¶

Public Functions

inline explicit CoeffProxy(const at::Tensor &element)¶
inline CoeffProxy &operator=(const Scalar_ &value)¶
template<typename T>
inline CoeffProxy &operator=(const T &value)¶
inline operator Scalar_() const¶

Solvers¶

template<typename MatrixType>
class PartialPivLU¶
template<typename MatrixType>
class LLT¶
template<typename MatrixType>
class HouseholderQR¶
template<typename MatrixType>
class JacobiSVD¶
template<typename MatrixType>
class EigenSolver¶

Geometry¶

Geometry types are provided through these headers:

  • Eigen/Quaternion

  • Eigen/AngleAxis

  • Eigen/Translation

  • Eigen/Transform

  • Eigen/Rotation2D

  • Eigen/Scaling

  • Eigen/ParametrizedLine

  • Eigen/Hyperplane

  • Eigen/AlignedBox

Sparse Operations¶

Sparse APIs are provided through these headers:

  • Eigen/SparseMatrix

  • Eigen/SparseVector

  • Eigen/SparseLU

  • Eigen/SparseQR

  • Eigen/SparseCholesky

Jacobi Internal Iterators¶

Jacobi helpers are provided through Eigen/Jacobi.

EigenTorch
